testCases.title: Verify user can login with valid username and password
steps: Open the login page URL in a browser
Enter username haklarr in the username field
Enter password Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application home or dashboard page.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect username and correct password
steps: Enter username invalidUser in the username field
Enter password Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt fails and an error message indicating invalid credentials is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with correct username and incorrect password
steps: Enter username haklarr in the username field
Enter password WrongPassword123 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt fails and an error message indicating invalid credentials is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are blank
testCases.expectedResult: Login is not performed and an error message indicates that username and password cannot be blank.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username is blank
testCases.expectedResult: System prevents login and displays validation indicating the username is required.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when password is blank
testCases.expectedResult: System prevents login and displays validation indicating the password is required.

testCases.title: Verify login page UI loads correctly
steps: Open the login page URL in the browser
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully and displays username field, password field, and login button.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters
testCases.expectedResult: Characters typed in the password field are masked and not visible as plain text.

testCases.title: Verify login using Enter key after entering credentials
steps: Press the Enter key instead of clicking the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Login is submitted and user is authenticated successfully.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username contains only whitespace
steps: Enter spaces in the username field
testCases.expectedResult: System rejects the login attempt and displays validation indicating invalid username input.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when password contains only whitespace
steps: Enter spaces in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: System rejects the login attempt and displays validation indicating invalid password input.

testCases.title: Verify login with leading and trailing spaces in username
steps: Enter username with leading and trailing spaces around haklarr
testCases.expectedResult: System trims unnecessary spaces or rejects the input with appropriate validation.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username contains special characters
testCases.expectedResult: System rejects the login attempt if special characters are not supported or displays invalid credential message.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with extremely long username input
steps: Enter a username longer than normal limits (e.g., 256 characters)
testCases.expectedResult: System either restricts the field length or shows validation without crashing the application.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with extremely long password input
steps: Enter a very long password string exceeding expected limits
testCases.expectedResult: System handles the input safely and displays login failure without system crash or UI issues.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are incorrect
testCases.expectedResult: System denies access and displays login failed message.

testCases.title: Verify repeated clicking of login button does not create multiple requests
steps: Rapidly click the Login button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: System processes a single login attempt and prevents duplicate submissions.

testCases.title: Verify login with copy-paste credentials
steps: Copy username haklarr and paste it into the username field
Copy password Icstunnel1 and paste it into the password field
testCases.expectedResult: User successfully logs into the application.

testCases.title: Verify username field retains focus on page load
steps: Observe which input field receives cursor focus by default
testCases.expectedResult: Cursor is automatically focused on the username field for immediate input.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username case is different
testCases.expectedResult: If the system is case-sensitive, login fails with invalid credentials; otherwise login succeeds.
